start.speaker: Elder Thom
start.text: Ah, young one. Dark times have come to our village. Goblins have taken over the cave in the Whispering Woods.

explain.speaker: Elder Thom
explain.text: You must venture through the forest and clear the cave. It will not be easy, but I believe in you. Take this blade.

encourage.speaker: Elder Thom
encourage.text: Dangerous indeed, but you have the heart of a hero. The village needs you. Will you help us?

farewell.speaker: Elder Thom
farewell.text: May the old gods watch over you. Speak to Brynn if you need supplies.

start.speaker: Elder Thom
start.text: You've made it through the forest once. The creatures there grow bolder. Be sure to stock up before you venture into the cave.

start.speaker: Elder Thom
start.text: You've been inside the caves... I can see it in your eyes. The goblin chief lurks on the lowest floor. Defeat him and our village will be safe.

start.speaker: Elder Thom
start.text: You did it! The goblin chief is no more! The tunnels are safe once again.

reward.speaker: Elder Thom
reward.text: The village owes you everything, hero. Take this — 50 gold, the least we can offer for your bravery.

farewell.speaker: Elder Thom
farewell.text: Rest well, champion. Your name will be remembered in Briarwood for generations to come.

start.speaker: Mother
start.text: Be careful out there, dear. I packed you some herbs for the road.

end.speaker: Mother
end.text: Come home safe. I'll be waiting.

start.speaker: Mother
start.text: I heard the wolves howling last night. Please be careful in those woods, dear.

start.speaker: Mother
start.text: The caves? Oh my... just promise me you'll come back. Here, take this.

start.speaker: Mother
start.text: My brave child... I'm so proud of you. Welcome home.

start.speaker: Brynn
start.text: Welcome! I've got potions and gear. What do you need?

shop.speaker: Brynn
shop.text: Take your time. Good gear keeps you alive!

start.speaker: Brynn
start.text: Back from the caves? You'll want better gear for the deeper floors. I've got some new stock.

shop.speaker: Brynn
shop.text: The chain mail is worth every coin if you're heading deeper.

start.speaker: Brynn
start.text: Heading into the Whispering Woods? Stock up on potions — you'll need them.

shop.speaker: Brynn
shop.text: A few health potions can mean the difference between life and death out there!

start.speaker: Brynn
start.text: The hero of Briarwood! Business has been booming since the goblin threat ended. Anything you need — on the house! Well, almost.

start.speaker: Kael
start.text: Hey! I heard Elder Thom gave you a mission. That's so cool! I wish I could come with you.

next_time.speaker: Kael
next_time.text: You bet! Bring me back a goblin tooth as a souvenir!

nervous.speaker: Kael
nervous.text: Don't worry, you've always been the brave one. Besides, I heard the forest herbs can patch you up in a pinch!

start.speaker: Kael
start.text: You fought wolves AND boars?! That's amazing! Did you find anything cool out there?

start.speaker: Kael
start.text: Wait, you went into the CAVE? With the goblins?! You're insane! ...in a good way. Be careful down there!

start.speaker: Kael
start.text: You beat the goblin chief!! Everyone's talking about it! You're a legend! Can I tell everyone we're best friends?

start.speaker: Martha
start.text: Welcome to the Hearthstone Inn, dear! You look like you could use a rest.

rest.speaker: Martha
rest.text: Sit by the fire. Let me bring you something warm. ...There. Good as new!

gossip.speaker: Martha
gossip.text: The Elder's been worried about the forest. Strange sounds at night. Be careful out there.

start.speaker: Martha
start.text: Back from the woods? You look rough. Come, rest a while.

rest.speaker: Martha
rest.text: A hot meal and a good rest will fix you right up. ...There we go.

gossip.speaker: Martha
gossip.text: Merchants can't get through the forest anymore. Wolves and worse on the paths.

start.speaker: Martha
start.text: Saints preserve us — you've been in the caves? Sit down this instant!

rest.speaker: Martha
rest.text: Don't you move until you've had a full meal. ...There. Promise me you'll be careful.

gossip.speaker: Martha
gossip.text: Old Hob says his grandfather spoke of tunnels beneath the hills. They go deep, much deeper than anyone remembers.

start.speaker: Martha
start.text: The hero of the hour! Drinks are on the house tonight. Rest as long as you like, dear!

start.speaker: Gareth
start.text: Forge's cold. Can't get ore shipments through with goblins on the roads. Come back when things improve.

start.speaker: Gareth
start.text: You've been to the forest? Roads are still blocked. Nothing I can do without supplies.

start.speaker: Gareth
start.text: Into the caves, eh? Some of those old tunnels had iron veins. Bring me anything interesting you find.

start.speaker: Gareth
start.text: News of that old journal brought some merchants back! I've managed a small ore shipment. The forge is hot again!

shop.speaker: Gareth
shop.text: Only the best for someone brave enough to face the caves!

start.speaker: Gareth
start.text: Trade routes are opening up! The forge hasn't been this busy in months. Take a look, hero!

shop.speaker: Gareth
shop.text: Only the finest steel for the village hero!

start.speaker: Sister Elara
start.text: May the old gods guide you, child. I tend the chapel and its ancient records.

lore.speaker: Sister Elara
lore.text: This chapel was built long before the village. The stones carry inscriptions in a tongue older than ours. I spend my days trying to decipher them.

start.speaker: Sister Elara
start.text: The forest grows restless. I've been praying for the safety of all who venture there.

start.speaker: Sister Elara
start.text: The caves hold ancient things. If you find anything with strange markings, bring it to me. I may be able to read them.

start.speaker: Sister Elara
start.text: What's this? Those symbols on that banner... I've seen similar markings in the chapel records!

choices.text: I found it in the caves.

decipher.speaker: Sister Elara
decipher.text: Give me a moment... Yes! These are old warding glyphs. The goblin chief uses this magic to seal his deepest chamber. Now that I understand the pattern, I can teach you to break through.

done.speaker: Sister Elara
done.text: The knowledge is in your mind now. Take this old healing tome as well — the arts within may save your life down there.

gift.speaker: Sister Elara
gift.text: May the old gods protect you. The barrier will yield, and whatever lies beyond... end it.

start.speaker: Sister Elara
start.text: The wards will yield to you now. Go with the blessing of the old gods, and end what lurks in the deepest chamber.

start.speaker: Sister Elara
start.text: The dark magic has lifted! I could feel it from here — like a weight removed from the world. You have done a great thing.

start.speaker: Farmer Hob
start.text: Fields have gone to seed with all these goblin raids. Too old to fight, but I keep watch.

watch.speaker: Farmer Hob
watch.text: Tracks near the tree line at dawn. Something's emboldened the beasts. Started long before the goblins, if you ask me.

start.speaker: Farmer Hob
start.text: Wolves are getting bolder. Found tracks near my fence this morning. Watch yourself in those woods.

start.speaker: Farmer Hob
start.text: You went into the caves? My grandfather told stories about those tunnels. Said they're older than the village itself.

start.speaker: Farmer Hob
start.text: Crops'll grow better now. I can feel it in the soil. Thank you, hero.

start.speaker: Mira
start.text: Wow, you're the one going on an adventure?! That's SO cool! I wanna be a hero too!

encourage.speaker: Mira
encourage.text: I'm gonna practice sword fighting every day! ...With a stick! But still!

dismiss.speaker: Mira
dismiss.text: I KNOW! That's what makes it exciting! Bring me back something cool, okay?

start.speaker: Mira
start.text: Did you see any wolves?! Were they scary?! I bet you were SO brave!

start.speaker: Mira
start.text: You went in a CAVE?! With GOBLINS?! That's the coolest thing EVER! ...Here, I found this shiny rock. You can have it for luck!

start.speaker: Mira
start.text: YOU DID IT!! I KNEW you would! I'm telling EVERYONE! You're my favorite hero in the whole world!

start.speaker: Elder Thom
start.text: Is that... a journal from the caves? Let me see! These pages are ancient, but I recognize the hand...

choices.text: I found it in the caves.

decipher.speaker: Elder Thom
decipher.text: This was written by a scholar who explored the caves long ago. It describes the goblin chief's lair — sealed by enchanted war banners deep within.

done.speaker: Elder Thom
done.text: Find the war banner on the deeper floors. Take it to Sister Elara at the chapel — she studies the ancient texts and may know how to break the wards.

start.speaker: Elder Thom
start.text: Have you found the goblin war banner yet? Sister Elara at the chapel is the one who can unravel its magic. Search the deeper cave floors.

start.speaker: Elder Thom
start.text: Sister Elara has broken the wards! The path to the goblin chief lies open. End this threat once and for all. The village is counting on you.
